proof:

  have eq := congr_fun (congr_arg (fun η => η.arrow d) heq) (id d)

debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

proof:
intro x hx
        rw [abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos _)]
        have h_bound : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
          rcases hx with ⟨h1, h2⟩
          by_cases hx_sign : 0 ≤ x
          · calc |x| = x := abs_of_nonneg hx_sign
               _ ≤ μ + 2 * √↑v := h2
               _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by linarith [le_abs_self μ]
          · push_neg at hx_sign
            calc |x| = -x := abs_of_neg hx_sign
                 _ ≤ -(μ - 2 * √↑v) := by linarith
                 _ = -μ + 2 * √↑v := by ring
                 _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by linarith [neg_le_abs μ]
        calc Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t * x|) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_abs_self _)
             _ = Real.exp (|t| * |x|) := by rw [abs_mul]
             _ ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v)) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_bound (abs_nonneg t))
verification_message: Proof verified successfully

debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

proof:
obtain ⟨F, hF, hδL⟩ := h
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  have hL_zero : L (0, 1) = 0 := by
    calc L (0, 1) = δL 0 := (hδL 0 0 0).symm
      _ = 0 := hδL0
  let φ : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →L[ℝ] ℝ := 
    L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm φ
  intro v
  calc δL v = L (v, 1) := hδL 0 v 0
    _ = L ((v, 0) + (0, 1)) := by congr 1; ext <;> simp
    _ = L (v, 0) + L (0, 1) := L.map_add _ _
    _ = L (v, 0) := by rw [hL_zero, add_zero]
    _ = φ v := rfl
    _ = ⟪(InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ _).symm φ, v⟫_ℝ := by simp [InnerProductSpace.toDual_symm_apply]
verification_message: Proof verified successfully
